'''鈭歴h-m-ch''' ('''shamacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:callus|callus]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:callus|callus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-m-ch
|-
! Lemma
| shamacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamachithi|shamachithi]] || [[word:shamachiji|shamachiji]] || [[word:shamachishi|shamachishi]] || [[word:shamachi|shamachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shamachuthuth|shamachuthuth]] || [[word:shamachujuj|shamachujuj]] || [[word:shamachushush|shamachushush]] || [[word:shamach|shamach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamachuthu|shamachuthu]] || [[word:shamachuju|shamachuju]] || [[word:shamachushu|shamachushu]] || [[word:shamachu|shamachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamachufuth|shamachufuth]] || [[word:shamachufuj|shamachufuj]] || [[word:shamachufush|shamachufush]] || [[word:shamachuf|shamachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamachethe|shamachethe]] || [[word:shamacheje|shamacheje]] || [[word:shamacheshe|shamacheshe]] || [[word:shamache|shamache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shamachothoth|shamachothoth]] || [[word:shamachojoj|shamachojoj]] || [[word:shamachoshosh|shamachoshosh]] || [[word:shamach|shamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamachotho|shamachotho]] || [[word:shamachojo|shamachojo]] || [[word:shamachosho|shamachosho]] || [[word:shamacho|shamacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamachofoth|shamachofoth]] || [[word:shamachofoj|shamachofoj]] || [[word:shamachofosh|shamachofosh]] || [[word:shamachof|shamachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamach忙th忙|shamach忙th忙]] || [[word:shamach忙j忙|shamach忙j忙]] || [[word:shamach忙sh忙|shamach忙sh忙]] || [[word:shamach忙|shamach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shamachathath|shamachathath]] || [[word:shamachajaj|shamachajaj]] || [[word:shamachashash|shamachashash]] || [[word:shamach|shamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamachatha|shamachatha]] || [[word:shamachaja|shamachaja]] || [[word:shamachasha|shamachasha]] || [[word:shamacha|shamacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamachafath|shamachafath]] || [[word:shamachafaj|shamachafaj]] || [[word:shamachafash|shamachafash]] || [[word:shamachaf|shamachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shamachasha|shamachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamachasha|goshamachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamachasha|gokishamachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shamachn眉sha|shamachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamachnkn眉sha|goshamachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamachn眉sha|gokishamachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamachsh毛sha|shamachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamachnksh毛sha|goshamachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamachsh毛sha|gokishamachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamachrosha|shamachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamachnkrosha|goshamachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamachrosha|gokishamachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamachmusha|shamachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamachnkmusha|goshamachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamachmusha|gokishamachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamachsherasha|shamachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamachnksherasha|goshamachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamachsherasha|gokishamachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamachngasha|shamachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamachnkngasha|goshamachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamachngasha|gokishamachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamachyasha|shamachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamachnkyasha|goshamachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamachyasha|gokishamachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamachyamasha|shamachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamachnkyamasha|goshamachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamachyamasha|gokishamachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamachn眉sh毛sha|shamachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamachnkn眉sh毛sha|goshamachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamachn眉sh毛sha|gokishamachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamachn眉rosha|shamachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamachnkn眉rosha|goshamachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamachn眉rosha|gokishamachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamachn眉musha|shamachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamachnkn眉musha|goshamachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamachn眉musha|gokishamachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamachsh毛n眉sha|shamachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamachnksh毛n眉sha|goshamachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamachsh毛n眉sha|gokishamachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamachsh毛rosha|shamachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamachnksh毛rosha|goshamachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamachsh毛rosha|gokishamachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamachsh毛musha|shamachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamachnksh毛musha|goshamachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamachsh毛musha|gokishamachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamachron眉sha|shamachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamachnkron眉sha|goshamachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamachron眉sha|gokishamachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamachrosh毛sha|shamachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamachnkrosh毛sha|goshamachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamachrosh毛sha|gokishamachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamachromusha|shamachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamachnkromusha|goshamachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamachromusha|gokishamachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamachmun眉sha|shamachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamachnkmun眉sha|goshamachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamachmun眉sha|gokishamachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamachmush毛sha|shamachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamachnkmush毛sha|goshamachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamachmush毛sha|gokishamachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamachmurosha|shamachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamachnkmurosha|goshamachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamachmurosha|gokishamachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shamach|shamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙m忙ch|sh忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshamach|hoshamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙m忙ch|hosh忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshamach|hohoshamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙m忙ch|hohosh忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shamach|n眉shamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙m忙ch|n眉sh忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shamach|n眉n眉shamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙m忙ch|n眉n眉sh忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shamach|n茂shamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙m忙ch|n茂sh忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shamach|n茂n茂shamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙m忙ch|n茂n茂sh忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushamach|lushamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙m忙ch|lush忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushamach|lulushamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙m忙ch|lulush忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishamach|lishamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙m忙ch|lish忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishamach|lilishamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙m忙ch|lilish忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshamach|koshamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙m忙ch|kosh忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshamach|kokoshamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙m忙ch|kokosh忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshamach|keshamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙m忙ch|kesh忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshamach|kekeshamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙m忙ch|kekesh忙m忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
